summary: An AARO memorandum records the first-hand narrative of Witness 4, a federal law enforcement agent, describing multiple sightings over two days in October 2023 in the western United States, plus later follow-up sightings. The witness reported orange/yellow/white orbs, clusters and lines of lights, lights that produced smaller lights, chemtrail-like phenomena, and a darker hovering object with a faint red light, all observed from ground vehicles at various distances and altitudes.
